name: eco
description: Prediction Pulse is a web application that fetches live prediction market data from Kalshi's public REST API, categorizes markets by topic (economy, politics, energy, climate), and uses OpenAI's GPT-4o-mini to translate raw contract prices into plain-English insights with actionable context. The target audience is small business owners, freelancers, and financially-aware individuals who want to make better decisions about things like refinancing, spending, hiring, and major purchases — not traders or quants.
